comment.body:
RiskDex uses SPY options, the most liquid options in the world, to calcu-
late the ratio of the normalized price of a 1 standard deviation out-of-the-
money put option with precisely 30 days to expiration to that of a 1 stand-
ard deviation out-of-the-money call option.
